title: Doggerly Board Client
body:
### DoggerlyBoard Client

**DoggerlyBoard Client** is the client-side module required to render and display leaderboards created by the DoggerlyBoard server mod.

This mod handles all visual components and in-game rendering, while the server module manages leaderboard data and tracking.

## 🔗 Required Server Mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/doggerly-boards

Make sure the server is running the DoggerlyBoard server module for this client mod to function properly.
